heading: Adjustment to basis of undistributed partnership property where section 754 election or substantial basis reduction
label: 734 Adjustment to basis of undistributed partnership property where section 754 election or substantial basis reduction
notes: Amendments2005—Subsec. (a). , inserted “with respect to such distribution” before period at end.Pub. L. 109–135, § 403(bb)(1)Subsec. (b). , reenacted heading without change and amended introductory provisions generally. Prior to amendment, introductory provisions read as follows: “In the case of a distribution of property to a partner, a partnership, with respect to which the election provided in section 754 is in effect or unless there is a substantial basis reduction, shall—”.Pub. L. 109–135, § 403(bb)(2)2004—, substituted “Adjustment to basis of undistributed partnership property where section 754 election or substantial basis reduction” for “Optional adjustment to basis of undistributed partnership property” in section catchline.Pub. L. 108–357, § 833(c)(5)(A)Subsec. (a). , inserted “or unless there is a substantial basis reduction” before period at end.Pub. L. 108–357, § 833(c)(1)Subsec. (b). , inserted “or unless there is a substantial basis reduction” after “section 754 is in effect” in introductory provisions.Pub. L. 108–357, § 833(c)(2)Subsec. (d). , added subsec. (d).Pub. L. 108–357, § 833(c)(3)Subsec. (e). , added subsec. (e).Pub. L. 108–357, § 833(c)(4)1984—Subsec. (b). inserted at end “Paragraph (1)(B) shall not apply to any distributed property which is an interest in another partnership with respect to which the election provided in section 754 is not in effect.”Pub. L. 98–369

children.heading: General rule
children.label: a General rule
children.text: The basis of partnership property shall not be adjusted as the result of a distribution of property to a partner unless the election, provided in section 754 (relating to optional adjustment to basis of partnership property), is in effect with respect to such partnership or unless there is a substantial basis reduction with respect to such distribution.

children.label: A
children.text: the amount of any gain recognized to the distributee partner with respect to such distribution under section 731(a)(1), and

children.label: B
children.text: in the case of distributed property to which section 732(a)(2) or (b) applies, the excess of the adjusted basis of the distributed property to the partnership immediately before the distribution (as adjusted by section 732(d)) over the basis of the distributed property to the distributee, as determined under section 732, or

children.label: A
children.text: the amount of any loss recognized to the distributee partner with respect to such distribution under section 731(a)(2), and

children.label: B
children.text: in the case of distributed property to which section 732(b) applies, the excess of the basis of the distributed property to the distributee, as determined under section 732, over the adjusted basis of the distributed property to the partnership immediately before such distribution (as adjusted by section 732(d)).

children.heading: Allocation of basis
children.label: c Allocation of basis
children.text: The allocation of basis among partnership properties where subsection (b) is applicable shall be made in accordance with the rules provided in section 755.

children.heading: In general
children.label: 1 In general
children.text: For purposes of this section, there is a substantial basis reduction with respect to a distribution if the sum of the amounts described in subparagraphs (A) and (B) of subsection (b)(2) exceeds $250,000.

children.heading: Regulations
children.label: 2 Regulations
children.text: For regulations to carry out this subsection, see section 743(d)(2).

children.heading: Exception for securitization partnerships
children.label: e Exception for securitization partnerships
children.text: For purposes of this section, a securitization partnership (as defined in section 743(f)) shall not be treated as having a substantial basis reduction with respect to any distribution of property to a partner.
